description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, ranging from #106 to #117. He did not record any GitHub commits or create any new repositories. He logged 9 hrs 48 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 25 mins.
